name: dropbox-sync
description: Dropbox history sync engine (auth, cursor sync, diff/snapshot/grouping, Mongo persistence) for the CHAD History feature. Consumed only by packages/dba — no UI, no HTTP server.

scripts.test: tsx src/diff.test.ts && tsx src/snapshot-rules.test.ts && tsx src/grouping.test.ts && tsx src/normalize.test.ts
